name: Infobip API
what_it_does: Infobip global omnichannel communication platform API — send SMS, WhatsApp, email, voice, and OTP messages across 190+ countries from a single API.
use_cases: Sending OTP and 2FA verification codes via SMS, WhatsApp, or voice from agent authentication flows
WhatsApp Business API messaging for customer notifications and conversational flows
Bulk SMS campaigns and transactional SMS from agent marketing or notification workflows
Email delivery with templates and tracking for agent-generated communication
Number lookup and HLR queries to validate phone numbers before sending messages
not_for: Developers needing a simple SMS-only API — use Twilio or Vonage for simpler SMS
Teams without enterprise communication volume — Infobip is enterprise-positioned
Low-cost bulk messaging at scale — pricing is premium compared to carriers directly
best_when: Enterprise agents need reliable global multi-channel messaging (SMS + WhatsApp + voice) with enterprise SLA and 24/7 support.
avoid_when: You only need SMS and want the simplest possible API — Twilio or Vonage are easier to start with.

auth.notes: API Key as Basic Auth (username=API key, password ignored) or Bearer token. Single API key for all channels. Webhook signature verification via HMAC.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with credits for testing; no long-term free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: SMS from $0.005/message; WhatsApp from $0.005/message + Meta fees; volume discounts available
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing negotiated. Trial credits available without credit card. Contact sales for high-volume rates.

performance.rate_limits: Default: 100 requests/second; higher limits available by request

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST errors include status codes and groupId/messageId for tracking. WhatsApp template errors can be opaque — template must be pre-approved by Meta. Delivery reports via webhook.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Sending same message twice creates two sends — no built-in deduplication. Use external tracking of messageIds to detect retries.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp templates must be pre-approved by Meta (24-72 hours) before agents can send templated messages
Delivery reports are async via webhook — agents cannot synchronously confirm delivery
Different API endpoints for SMS vs WhatsApp vs email — not a single unified send endpoint
Phone numbers must be in E.164 format including country code — validation recommended before sending
WhatsApp Business Account verification required before production use — cannot skip for production

security_score_components.security_notes: HMAC webhook verification. TLS enforced for all API calls. SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant. Single API key is a security weakness — no per-key scoping.
